title: Good Luck Multicolor Latex Balloons (30cm) Pack of 5 - Party Balloons for Celebrations & Decorations
features: GOOD LUCK LATEX BALLOONS: Elevate your event's ambiance with our premium good luck multicolor latex balloons - perfect for adding that extra touch of festivity and good fortune to any celebration or decoration project.

VIBRANT MULTICOLOR PACK: This pack of 5, 30cm balloons features assorted eye-catching colors, allowing you to mix and match to create a dazzling and lively party atmosphere tailored to your desired theme.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Made from strong and long-lasting latex, these balloons are designed to resist bursting and maintain their shape throughout your event, ensuring a worry-free and joyous experience for you and your guests.

VERSATILE PARTY ESSENTIAL: Ideal for birthday parties, baby showers, weddings, graduations, anniversaries, or any other momentous occasion - our good luck multicolor balloons serve as essential decorative elements to enhance your event's unique aesthetic.
EASY TO INFLATE: Our 30cm latex balloons can be inflated quickly using air or helium, allowing you to efficiently prepare your decorations without hassle.
description: Product Description Brighten the festivities with bold bursts of colour using these Pearlised Latex Good Luck Balloons. Featuring "Good Luck!" text and a stars design printed all over, these assorted balloons are ideal for adding shimmering colour to a leaving party, or when giving best wishes to a friend's new venture. Arrange them with foil balloons, a balloon weight and curling ribbon to create a dazzling table centrepiece, or arrange them on a wall behind the food table as part of a cheerful party backdrop. Box Contains 1 x Balloons
